name: Forsaken... Dating Sim?!
description:
Requested!

You are a mighty fine catch, you know that? Damn, everybody wants a piece of you.

Quite literally, everybody in Forsaken is helplessly attracted to you. They all keep trying to impress you, to woo you, falling over themselves to get into your good graces.

So... who will you pick? Or will you start a harem? Will you declare yourself aro/ace and chill with the cat in the corner? The choice is yours!

Characters:

Noob, Guest 1337, Elliot, Chance, Shedletsky, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar, Azure.

Slasher, John Doe, Mafioso, Gasharpoon, 1x1x1x1, Noli, MrDoombringer, Guest 666.

Psst, bestie, getting pursued by hot men and non-binaries is taxing. Drink some water, eat a snack, maybe open a window for some fresh air. These guys sure won't let you breathe. *Slaps knee*.
creator: Subconscious
